file_purpose: Defines visual and stylistic parameters for generating character portraits in the Valley by Night chronicle. Ensures consistent tone, lighting, and atmosphere for all NPC and PC images.

visual_style.composition: Square 1:1 aspect ratio, portrait framing, film-still atmosphere

lighting.key_light: single warm or cool source, soft fill, minimal rim

texture.focus: eyes and face remain sharp focal point

shared_elements: backgrounds implying personal environment (stage, studio, desert, city)

prompt_template: Square portrait of [Character Name], a [Clan or Role] from Valley by Night, depicted in a cinematic World of Darkness style. [Brief physical traits and attire]. Lighting is moody and dramatic, with [color accent or environment]. The image feels intimate and realistic, like a film still, with subtle haze and emotional tension.

color_and_lighting_reference.depth: shallow depth of field, blurred backgrounds

archetype_variants.Toreador: Glamour and restraint — satin, glass, and poised elegance.
archetype_variants.Gangrel: Natural grit — desert hues, windblown textures, feral calm.
archetype_variants.Malkavian: Uneven lighting, reflections, surreal dream tone.
archetype_variants.Setite: Candlelight, gold accents, deep shadows, serpentine patterns.
archetype_variants.Giovanni: Muted luxury — marble, grayscale warmth, Italian refinement.
